steps.title: This protocol performs the final library...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs the final library pooling step of NGS library prep. Sample volumes should be specified in a `.csv` file formatted as followed (**including headers line**). Transfers will be executed in the order specified in the `.csv`: ``` source well of elution plate (slot 9),transfer volume(uL) A1,4 A2,3 A3,5.3 A4,6.4 ... ``` --- * [Eppendorf twin.tec 96-well PCR plate 150ul #0030128605](https://online-shop.eppendorf.com/OC-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Plates-44516/Eppendorf-twin.tec-PCR-Plates-PF-8180.html) * [Opentrons temperature module](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/tempdeck) with [4x6-well aluminum block insert](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set) * [Opentrons 4-in-1 tuberack](https://shop.opentrons.com/products/tube-rack-set-1?_ga=2.256255875.900706806.1575911292-1245111371.1550251253) with 4x6 insert for [2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes](https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Tubes-44515/Eppendorf-Safe-Lock-Tubes-PF-8863.html) or equivalent. * [Opentrons 10ul and 200ul filter tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [Opentrons GEN1 P10 and P300 single-channel electronic pipettes](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) --- 4x6 tuberack with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tube (slot 2) * tube A1: water 4x6 aluminum block insert with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tube (on temperature module, slot 4): * tube A1: pool tube (loaded empty)

steps.title: Input the sample volume `
steps.instruction: Input the sample volume `.csv` file formatted as specified above, the volume of water for pooling (in uL), and the respective mount sides for your P10 and p300 single-channel pipettes.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
